title: No client data to external AI
description: Users must not share client data, confidential customer information, or any client-owned content with external AI tools.
user_message: You cannot send client or confidential data to external AI tools. Use the internal AI assistant or redacted data instead.

title: No source code or technical configurations to external AI
description: Users must not paste proprietary source code, scripts, architecture diagrams, infrastructure configuration, server details, or internal technical documents into external AI tools.
user_message: Internal code, scripts, and technical configurations must not be shared with external AI tools.

title: Personal or regulated data needs caution
description: Personally identifiable information, regulated identifiers, or sensitive personal records should not be casually shared. If used, they must be redacted and handled carefully.
examples: Summarize this customer PAN and address record
user_message: This may contain personal or regulated data. Redact sensitive fields before using external AI.

title: Generic learning questions allowed
description: Users may ask generic technical or learning questions as long as they include no internal or client data.
examples: Give a simple explanation of IAM
How does DLP work in general?
user_message: Generic learning questions like this are allowed. Avoid including internal names or data.

title: No financial or pricing information to external AI
description: Users must not share quotations, pricing sheets, financial forecasts, budgets, margins, or commercial pricing data with external AI tools.
examples: Summarize this pricing sheet for our customer
Improve this cost estimate and margin table
Analyse this budget forecast for next quarter
user_message: Financial and pricing information cannot be shared with external AI tools.

title: No legal or contractual documents to external AI
description: Users must not upload or paste agreements, NDAs, terms and conditions, procurement contracts, or legal review notes into external AI tools.
examples: Review these contract clauses for legal risk
user_message: Legal and contractual documents must not be shared with external AI tools.

title: No credentials or secrets to external AI
description: Users must not share passwords, API keys, tokens, private keys, connection strings, or secrets with external AI tools.
examples: Here is my API key, help me debug this
user_message: Passwords, API keys, tokens, and secrets must never be shared with external AI tools.

title: No internal HR or employee-sensitive data to external AI
description: Users must not share salary information, performance reviews, employee grievances, appraisal notes, or internal HR records with external AI tools.
examples: Improve wording for this HR grievance summary
user_message: Employee and HR-sensitive information cannot be shared with external AI tools.

title: No confidential internal business documents to external AI
description: Users must not share internal-only reports, management presentations, strategy notes, business plans, meeting minutes, or confidential internal documents with external AI tools.
user_message: Confidential internal business documents must not be shared with external AI tools.

title: Security findings and incident details need caution
description: Security incident notes, vulnerability findings, threat reports, or internal detection content should be handled carefully and ideally sanitized before external use.
user_message: Security findings may contain sensitive internal details. Sanitize before using external AI.

title: Public content drafting allowed
description: Users may use external AI to improve wording for clearly public, non-confidential communication and general drafting tasks.
user_message: This looks like a safe public drafting use case.

title: Mixed business context requires review
description: If a prompt mixes general writing with internal business context, user names, project names, or operational details, the content should be reviewed before submission.
examples: Draft a better explanation for this delivery issue
user_message: This may contain internal business context. Review and redact before sending.

title: No database exports or records to external AI
description: Users must not share tables, records, exported datasets, or raw database extracts that contain business, operational, or personal data.
examples: Find insights in this internal records dump
user_message: Raw records and data exports must not be shared with external AI tools.

title: Emails and communications may contain hidden sensitive data
description: Email threads, chats, and communications can embed sensitive context even if they look harmless, so they should be reviewed before submission.
user_message: Messages and email threads may contain hidden sensitive context. Review carefully.

title: General conceptual brainstorming allowed
description: Non-confidential conceptual brainstorming, ideation, and generic academic explanation are allowed when they contain no internal identifiers or proprietary data.
examples: Give me project ideas for DLP
Suggest features for a final year project
user_message: This is a general brainstorming use case and is allowed.
